title: Win an internship with Khaitan & Co in the 2nd IDIA Karnataka Essay Competition
description: The Karnataka Chapter of Increasing Diversity by Increasing Access to Legal Education (IDIA) is conducting the 2nd Annual Essay Writing Competition in collaboration with Khaitan & Co.IDIA is a non-profit, student-run movement that aims to empower underprivileged and marginalised children through legal education. The 2nd Annual Essay Competition is a part of its fundraising activities. EligibilityAll undergraduate law students, in both Integrated law degrees (5-Years) and standalone law degre
